response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned, versatile engineer with 25+ years across web, mobile, and systems work, genuine testing craftsmanship, and notable low-latency experience at Sociomantic. However, he misses the core minimum qualifications for this specific role: his professional C++ experience amounts to roughly one year (National Instruments, 2007-2008) against a required 8 years, his large-scale distributed-systems work is mostly in DLang and dates back over a decade, and he has no production cloud compute platform or formal cloud/DevOps technical-leadership background. He would be a strong candidate for a senior full-stack or developer-tooling role, but not for a C++-centric cloud compute platform tech lead.
strengths: 25+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, embedded, desktop, and systems programming
Hands-on low-latency, high-throughput systems work (micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic)
Strong testing and mentoring culture: authored OSS test frameworks, ran multi-day courses, workshops, and coding dojos
concerns: Roughly one year of professional C++ experience versus the required 8 years; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
Limited production cloud architecture and compute-platform experience; recent work is product-focused full-stack and AI tooling
No formal technical-leadership role leading or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineering teams at scale

key_factors.factor: Limited cloud/compute platform and distributed-systems depth
